scores.correctness_notes: Core pattern is correct: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait(all_active). Structural difference (deploy in fixture vs test function) is a valid alternative pattern, not an error.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: describes juju.wait(jubilant.all_active) as blocking until units are active/idle, but all_active only checks active status (not idle). Additionally, status.apps[x].is_active and result.success from juju.run() are unverifiable against the gold standard but plausible jubilant API details.
